svg.title: Billing App System Architecture
svg.desc: Full architecture diagram of the billing app, API gateway, and how they interact with RabbitMQ, PostgreSQL, and the inventory service.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What tools does a client use to send requests in this project?')
sendPrompt('What does the API Gateway do in this project?')
g.text: Proxy to inventory / Queue to billing

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What files make up the inventory app?')
sendPrompt('What does the movies database contain?')
sendPrompt('How does RabbitMQ work and why do we use it for billing?')
g.text: Stores messages when billing is down

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What are the two roles of server.py in the billing app?')
g.text: Thread 1 — worker.py: reads queue → saves order

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the orders database contain?')

svg.text: Click any box to ask Claude about it
